title: Apple God
description: This mod adds a few new, powerful apples to the game.
body:
# All of these new Apples get added:

### Booster
![Booster Apple Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a02ed6759c50bb0310ce3254a1b5c7d4000a99a.png)


### Coral
![Coral Apple Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a78bc13c36ce4485ada3c35cb92875d9e600d90.png)

![Compacted Golden Apple Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e0c1b6fcbe592cf5c36e89efa381290729baafd.png)

![Chance Apple Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2dfa75e36e4df58f4472ff5af1778ed5bdc004cf.png)

![Netherite Infused Apple Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e69b76f7b05e52d6d81f837309bd0c8910dc6fa.png)


## A non-renewable way to craft Enchanted Golden Apples and finnaly putting Bottles o' Enchanting to a use!
![Enchanted Golden Apple Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70b63aef995658be33fa3bb90f7522e87c639cd4.png)
